name: Big mine ice Arena Pickle Ball
description: Come play pickleball at Big mine ice Arena Pickle Ball in Crested Butte, CO! There are 6 concrete courts. 3 are indoors and 3 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, lights, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available.
open_play_schedule: Open seven days a week, combination lock to nets and barriers accessible through the Crested Butte Recreation Department, which has a website
hours: Monday-Friday 8:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. Address : 507 Maroon Ave, Crested Butte, CO 81224 Phone: 970-349-5338 Thank you to the talented local photographers whose work is featured on this site: Lydia Stern, Robby Lloyd, and Nolan Blunk. name: CB Old School Gym - Crested Butte
description: CB Old School Gym - Crested Butte is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Crested Butte, CO. There is 1 indoor wood court. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The court is free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. You can reserve the court.
open_play_schedule: Please see calendar and schedule at crestedbutterec.com

name: CharMar Park
description: Come play pickleball at CharMar Park in Gunnison, CO! There are 5 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Gunnison Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Gunnison Community Center in Gunnison, CO! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Larkspur Subdivision - Crested Butte
description: Larkspur Subdivision - Crested Butte is a place to play pickleball in Crested Butte, CO. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Newcomb Community Center
description: Newcomb Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pitkin, CO. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free. You can’t reserve the court.

name: Ted Scheske Town Park
description: Ted Scheske Town Park is a place to play pickleball in Crested Butte, CO. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: The Club at Crested Butte
description: The Club at Crested Butte is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Crested Butte, CO. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Western Colorado University - Mountaineer Fieldhouse
description: Western Colorado University - Mountaineer Fieldhouse is a place to play pickleball in Gunnison, CO. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A membership is required to play.
